headline: Amazon to Apply 3.5% Fuel Surcharge to Third-Party Sellers
summary: The e-commerce giant is the latest company to impose the temporary fees as the Iran war drives up energy prices.

headline: Analyzing the Energy Sector's Strong Earnings Outlook
summary: Energy earnings expectations have risen sharply over recent weeks, with the current +7.6% earnings growth rate expected in 2026 Q1 up from +0.9% a week back and the -1.9% decline expected at the start of January.

raw.headline: Analyzing the Energy Sector's Strong Earnings Outlook
raw.summary: Energy earnings expectations have risen sharply over recent weeks, with the current +7.6% earnings growth rate expected in 2026 Q1 up from +0.9% a week back and the -1.9% decline expected at the start of January.

headline: Amazon to Boost Fuel Surcharges on Third-Party Sellers as Costs Rise
summary: Amazon announced a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge to sellers, following similar moves by FedEx and UPS.

raw.headline: Amazon to Boost Fuel Surcharges on Third-Party Sellers as Costs Rise
raw.summary: Amazon announced a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge to sellers, following similar moves by FedEx and UPS.

headline: Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for sellers as Iran war drives up energy prices
summary: With the war in Iran now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.

raw.headline: Amazon to add 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for sellers as Iran war drives up energy prices
raw.summary: With the war in Iran now in its fifth week, Amazon said it's adding a 3.5% fuel and logistics surcharge for third-party sellers in the U.S. and Canada.

headline: FedEx SameDay Local And AI Push Reframe Growth And Execution Story
summary: FedEx (NYSE:FDX) has launched FedEx SameDay Local, a rapid delivery solution focused on time-definite local shipments. The service is powered in part by a partnership with last mile logistics platform OneRail. FedEx also plans to roll out AI-enabled automation and predictive systems across more than half of its operational workflows by 2028. For investors watching NYSE:FDX, this move pushes the company deeper into same day and on demand delivery, a segment where customer expectations around...

headline: CNBC Daily Open: Trump threatens to put Iran in 'stone ages,' dampening ceasefire hopes
summary: Asia-Pacific markets reacted negatively to Trump's speech, while oil prices jumped
